# Q00b confirm gx 06 hosts (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_hosts` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q00b confirm gx 06 hosts.

```sql
dataset = gx_06_hosts | fields host, tier, owner | limit 50
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 9). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
